gradient.$description: Terminal dark-mode gradient tokens. Evoke CRT phosphor screens: cyan sweeping into deep teal-blue, phosphor green bleeding into cyan.

primary.$description: Primary gradient — cyan to deep teal-blue, like a beam sweeping across a phosphor screen. Uses horizontal direction (centerLeft → centerRight).

accent.$description: Accent gradient — teal-gray to deep teal, the accent identity sweeping into the terminal backdrop.

surface.$description: Surface gradient — subtle dark phosphor sheen. Color(0x2800CC99) and Color(0x28005F6A): alpha=0x28 (16% opacity).

surface-primary.$description: Surface gradient tinted with primary — cyan phosphor tint for primary-accented containers. Color(0x3300CC99) and Color(0x33009970): alpha=0x33 (20% opacity).

surface-accent.$description: Surface gradient tinted with accent — dark gray tint for accent-accented containers. Color(0x287A9A9A) and Color(0x283D5F5F): alpha=0x28 (16% opacity).
